titleStmt.title: SII 27.127: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 127. (A.R. No. 536 of 1929-30.) BAINDŪR, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the courtyard of a private house near the Local Fund Dispensary.

This record registers gifts of lands and money by several individuals to god Pārśvanātha and other deities set up in the basti at Baidūr. It states that Gōpīnātha-dēva-oḍeya was governing Bārakūra- rājya while Dēvappa-daṇṇāyaka was ruling the rājya. It refers to two religious teachers Maladhāri Lalitakīrti and Dharmachandradēva both probably belonging to Mūla-saṅgha, Pustaka-gachchha, Koṇḍakund-ānvaya and Dēsi-gaṇa.
It is dated Śaka 1371, Śukla, Chaitra śu. 10, Thursday. The tithi corresponds to 1449 A.D., April 2, the weekday being Wednesday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged
śrīmatparama gaṁbhīra syādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jiyā trailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1371 neya vartamāna śuklasaṁvatsarada cayitra śu 10 gu
ruvāradalu śrīmatu rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra pratāpa mallikārjuna mahārāyaru vijayana
lirdu rājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalū dēvappadaṁṇāyakaru rājyavanu pālisuva kāladalli
gōpīnāthadēva Oḍeyaru bārakūra rājyava pratipālisuva kāladalu baiṁdūru
baiṁdūru bastiya śrī pāriśvanāthadēvarige
suranarauragastutige puṁṇya puṁṇyamūrtivasthirateya kṣamaṁ
desevu dhareyoḷagaggaḷaṁ baidūra pāriśvanāthaniṁ vara diṭavaidayadi bhavyajanakke mana śrēyārtthaṁ mu
koṭivīdiya meṭṭa meṭṭaru naḍeveḍeyoḷa basamaiyaṁ tuṟisade Oḍalasukhabhōgya naṟanade kaḍugali maladhāri
lalitakīrti Etipaṁ vratipanu śrīmūlasaṁghavara pustakagacchada koṁḍakuṁdānvaya saṁpradāe
dēsigaṇādhiyeti dharmacaṁdradēvara baidūrina nakara doḷaguḷḷa bastimaneya catussīmegaḍiya vivara
gāvaṇi baḷiya gōpīnāthadēvara dēvasvada dittaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu baḍagalu jagadārādhyara dēvasvada hittila Ōṇi Iṁdaṁ
teṁkalu paḍuvalu gōpīnātha dēvara dēvālyada Ōṇi Iṁdaṁ mūḍalu paḍuvalu māṇivilāsada vṛttiya hittiliṁda Ōṇiya
mūḍalu teṁkalu maleya daṁṇāyakara vrittikāṟada hittiliṁda baḍagalu teṁkalu vrittikāṟavāra sāleya hitti
liṁda baḍagalu mūḍalu gāvaṇi baḷiya gaṇapiseṭṭiyabāḷiṁda paḍuvalu gāvaṇi baḷiya bāḷiṁda paḍuvalu
baḍagalu puruseṭṭiya bāḷiṁda teṁkalu teṁkagāvaṇibaḷiya gaṇapiseṭṭiya bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu Iṁtī catu
sīmeya Oḷaguḷavivara hittilu 3 gadde bittu hāni 50 . baṁki Aruṇeya kāṭiyaṁṇaseṭṭi baiṁdūra pāri
śvatītthaṁkararige Amṛtapaḍige dharmake koṭṭa gaddeya vivara . rāma heggaḍeya bāḷiṁda teṁkalu taṁmāḷana bāḷiṁkalu is written above the line.
da baḍaga puruseṭṭiya bāḷiṁ(.)da paḍuvalu kuppiseṭṭiya bāḷiṁda baḍagalu Upuṁdada durggādēviya
bāḷiṁda mūḍalu Iṁtīcatussīmeya Oḷaguḷa gadde 1 . bittu mūḍe 1 . Iṁtī Upuṁdadasīme Oḷage bi
ṭṭadharmadagadde 1 . śrīmatu puruseṭṭiya mābalaseṭṭi A nālvara tāi makkaḷu koṭṭadharma Aṁgaḍiya teṁkalu Oṁdu
hittilanū baidūra bastiya brahmadēvarige dīpakke koṭṭa hittila vivaramūḍalu gōpaṁṇa seṭṭiya beṁ(ma)
maṁṇaseṭṭiya maneIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu kanakake baḷiya hittiliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu baṁ
kēsvarada dēvasvada kaḷañiya gaddeya mūḍalu baḍagalu caturmmukhara maṭada dēvasvada bāḷiṁ teṁ
kalu Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa hittilu dharmmake koṭṭadu śrīmatu taṁmāḷvana Oḍahuṭṭida bāle
yakka seṭṭitti baidūra bastiyalu māge maḷegāla besugeya māḍida Eraḍutaṁḍu ruśiyargga Āhāra
dānakke hāladhārege māḍidadharmma bārakūriṁge saluva kāṭigadyāṇa hoṁnu 200 Ihoṁnanu baidū
ra sīme Oḷage Aḍige Aruvārakke koṭṭa hoṁnu Ā hoṁnina lābhadoḷage muṁdaḷavaru dharmmavanu vicārisi māḍuvaru .
Aṁtubaidūra pāriśvatīrtthaṁkararige Amṛtapaḍige koṭṭagaddeya hesaru bayalugadde . haḷeya keṟeyagadde .
keṟeya bayalagadde kuṇikina gadde . beṁmara hāḷiyagadde . Aṁkaṭagadde . kāraḍiya gaddeya mēlaṇa
50 hānegadde . Aivattu hāniya mēluḷa hiriyagadde . makkiya Atārubaṁḍa beḷageya gadde . biḷila
gadde koḷiyaḍiya gadde © śrīmatu hāḍavaḷiya baḍakoṁgana maga beṁmaṁṇaseṭṭi baidūra pārśva
nāthaṁge gaṁgaranāḍoḷage māḍida dharma Aḍake 8 phala 33 Adakke koṭṭa gaddeya sīmeya vivara . mūḍalu beṁmaṁṇa seṭṭiyamane
Ōṇiya paḍuvalu teṁkabaḍaga paḍuvalu I mūṟu dikkina kallakaṭṭada kaṭṭi Oḷaguḷa catussīmeya Oḷage hosamāḍida gaddehāne bi
javari 40 .ēach line commences with
Digital edition of SII 27.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
